introSection: Flying Apsaras in Western Region is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. It opened on 10 February 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
The roller coaster has one vertical drop and one near-vertical drop. The second drop dives into a tunnel which passes underneath Great Desert-Rally, a Great Coasters International wooden roller coaster.

There is an unusual method for storing loose items. Three storage boxes are hung from a track above. Riders may place their bags in a box, which is subsequently moved over the station to the other side of the track, where riders can retrieve their bags.

fullText:
Flying Apsaras in Western Region is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Jinniu, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. It opened on 10 February 2018.

The roller coaster has one vertical drop and one near-vertical drop. The second drop dives into a tunnel which passes underneath Great Desert-Rally, a Great Coasters International wooden roller coaster.

There is an unusual method for storing loose items. Three storage boxes are hung from a track above. Riders may place their bags in a box, which is subsequently moved over the station to the other side of the track, where riders can retrieve their bags.
